ground_truth.title: Black Edition
ground_truth.main_content:
Complete high-protein powder meal

When you need a meal that works as hard as you do. This shake delivers 40g of protein, up to 11g of fiber, no artificial sweeteners, and all 27 essential vitamins and minerals. Smooth, satisfying, and ready in seconds. It's serious nutrition without the hassle.

How to use Black Edition

Add 2 cups (16 fl oz) of water to your shaker. Add two scoops of Black Edition powder. Shake for 20 seconds or blend for a smoother texture. Enjoy a nutritionally complete meal!

Science & Testing

Huel is tested by a range of independent ISO 17025-accredited laboratories covering every stage of production, from raw materials to finished products, for microorganisms, nutrition, heavy metals, pesticides, and allergens.

HSA/FSA eligible with Truemed

The IRS allows you to use your pre-tax funds for purchases from Huel with a Letter of Medical Necessity, which Truemed helps you get.

This is a meal. Not another protein shake.

All the nutrients you need to thrive.

40g plant-based protein

27 vitamins & minerals

9-11g fiber per meal

100% nutritionally complete

0 artificial sweeteners

Formulated with naturally beneficial superfoods

Crafted using the finest ingredients in nature, we meticulously choose only the highest quality sources, never settling for anything less.

Pea Protein
A plant-based protein which can help aid muscle maintenance, growth and function.

Flaxseed
Packed with calcium, which helps support digestive enzymes and a healthy metabolism.

Brown Rice Protein
A plant-based protein packed with nutrients such as phosphorus, which contributes to normal function of cell membranes.

Tapioca
A gluten-free starch extracted from cassava root, used to create a smooth, creamy texture.

Organic Coconut
High in fiber and rich in medium-chain triglycerides (MCTs) and potassium.

Benefits of Black Edition

100% Complete - All the nutrition you need.
Save Time - A complete meal in seconds.
Easy - Just scoop, shake, go.

No artificial flavors. No artificial colors. 100% vegan. Plant-based protein. Gluten-Free. Non-GMO.

Over 160 health benefits

Every Huel product is rich in essential vitamins, minerals, and science-backed benefits to support and maintain your optimal health.

Muscle Function. Reduced Fatigue. Immune Support. Digestive Support. Heart Health. Hair, Skin & Nails.

Frequently Asked Questions

Is Huel Black Edition a meal replacement?
Huel Black Edition isn't just a meal replacement - it's complete food. While it's convenient and often used in place of traditional meals, Huel Black Edition is designed to be nutritionally complete, not a temporary substitute.

How much protein is in Huel Black Edition?
Each 90g serving of Huel Black Edition provides 40g of high-quality, plant-based protein from pea and rice sources.

Is Huel Black Edition low carb?
Yes, Huel Black Edition contains fewer carbs than Huel Powder - however nutritionals may differ depending on flavor.

When should I have Huel Black Edition?
Huel Black Edition can be enjoyed whenever you need a quick, nutritious meal - perfect for breakfast, lunch, or post-workout fuel.

What's the difference between Huel Black Edition and Huel Powder?
Huel Black Edition contains more protein, fewer carbs, and no artificial sweeteners. It's tailored for people seeking a higher-protein, lower-carb meal option.

Is Huel Black Edition suitable for vegans?
Yes, Huel Black Edition is 100% vegan and made with plant-based protein sources.

Can Huel Black Edition help with weight loss?
Huel Black Edition can support weight loss by providing easy portion control to help support your goals and manage your calorie intake while still providing nutrition.
with: 40g of protein, up to 11g of fiber, no artificial sweeteners
100% vegan and made with plant-based protein sources
